title: consolidate dashboard.${PROD_DOMAIN} into /admin/monitoring
description:
## Summary
Replaces the standalone Express operator dashboard at `dashboard.${PROD_DOMAIN}` with the existing styled Svelte `/admin/monitoring`. One UI handles everything; the dashboard subdomain is removed.

## What moves into /admin/monitoring
- **New ArgoCDTab** ‚Äî sync/health KPIs + per-app table, polling 15s.
- **New LogsTab** ‚Äî namespace + pod (+ container) selector + tail viewer.
- **Bugs tab gains** comment thread, add-comment, and "Wieder √∂ffnen" (reopen). The previously broken JSON path through `/api/admin/bugs/{resolve,archive}` is fixed (it was silently 200ing via a 303 redirect chain).
- **MonitoringDashboard tabs**: √úbersicht / Cluster / Deployments / ArgoCD / Logs / Bugs / Tracking. Drops the empty Tasks stub.
- **admin.astro**: the Dashboard tile (which had replaced the dead Traefik tile in PR #554) now points to `/admin/monitoring` and is renamed Monitoring.

## New API endpoints (all behind getSession + isAdmin)
- `GET /api/admin/bugs/[id]` ‚Äî ticket + comments
- `POST /api/admin/bugs/[id]/comments` ‚Äî append comment, author = session
- `POST /api/admin/bugs/reopen` ‚Äî reopen
- `POST /api/admin/bugs/resolve` and `archive` ‚Äî now also accept JSON
- `GET /api/admin/cluster/argocd-apps` ‚Äî ArgoCD Applications
- `GET /api/admin/cluster/logs` ‚Äî pod logs
- `GET /api/admin/cluster/pods-list` ‚Äî compact pod list for the Logs dropdown

## RBAC (`k3d/website.yaml` ClusterRole)
- + `argoproj.io/applications` [get, list]
- + core `pods/log` [get]

## Teardown
- `prod-{mentolder,korczewski}/{dashboard-web,oauth2-proxy-dashboard,ingress-dashboard}.yaml` removed and dropped from each `kustomization.yaml`. ArgoCD `automated.prune+selfHeal` will delete the live resources on next sync.
- `dashboard/` source dir, `docker/Dockerfile.dashboard-web`, `scripts/dashboard-bootstrap-korczewski.sh`, and the `dashboard:*` / `feature:dashboard` Taskfile entries removed.
- Left in place (harmless leftovers, removable later): `DASHBOARD_DOMAIN` in `configmap-domains.yaml` / ApplicationSet env / Taskfile envsubst / realm `dashboard` client.

## Test plan
- [x] Website rebuilt + rolled on both prod clusters; new tabs/strings present in compiled bundle (`ArgoCD`, `Verlauf`, `Wieder √∂ffnen`, `/api/admin/cluster/logs`, `Monitoring`, `/admin/monitoring`).
- [x] `kubectl auth can-i list applications.argoproj.io --as=‚Ä¶website` ‚Üí yes (both clusters).
- [x] All new endpoints return `401` without a session cookie (auth guard correct).
- [ ] After merge: ArgoCD prunes the 6 dashboard resources from `workspace` and `workspace-korczewski`.
- [ ] Admin login at https://web.mentolder.de/admin ‚Üí click "Monitoring" ‚Üí all 7 tabs load; Bugs add-comment/reopen works; ArgoCD lists Applications; Logs shows pod output.

ü§ñ Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
